description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular double-faced head made of dark metal. The head features pronounced, ridged striking surfaces on both ends and a central spike protruding from one side, suggesting it is designed for both smashing and puncturing tasks. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be constructed from wood with a dark finish, transitioning to a textured grip area near the base for improved handling. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for demanding demolition or construction work in urban environments. The hammer's head is solid and blocky, with a matte, slightly rough surface that indicates durability. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its functional purpose.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a double-faced, ridged metal head and a long, straight wooden handle with a textured grip. The head includes a central spike for puncturing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular, ridged faces of the hammer head and the central spike clearly.
description_view_1: Angled view highlights the length of the handle and the protruding spike on the hammer head.
description_view_2: Side view displays the full length of the handle and the square, textured striking face of the head.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view reveals the symmetry of the hammer head and the spike's alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a dark finish and a textured grip area near the base for enhanced control.
attribute_head_type: Double-faced sledgehammer head with rectangular, ridged striking surfaces and a central metal spike for puncturing.
